g.text: Liabilities and absorption factors: component stock levels
Rebased to zero at the first observation in the recent window
Assets: cumulative change since the recent anchor date
This makes shifts in reserves, TGA, RRP, and currency easier to compare directly
Liabilities and absorption factors: cumulative change since the recent anchor date
This board focuses on a distinct balance-sheet angle rather than policy-rate or corridor mechanics: asset and liability stocks are shown
directly in trillions, then rebased to zero over the recent window to highlight which balance-sheet lines actually drove the latest moves.
